plot outline: Bond has left active service and is enjoying a tranquil life in Jamaica. His peace is short-lived when his old friend Felix Leiter from the CIA turns up asking for help. The mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.
title: No Time to Die
akas: نو تايم تو داي (Egypt, English title)
พยัคฆ์ร้ายฝ่าเวลามรณะ (Thailand, English title)
No Time To Die (Ireland, English title)
